prompt: Tap SB before blocker-adjusted depth action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before stack-depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Small blind is the seat anchor because that partly committed seat is the first one blocker pressure can force into trouble.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is the right anchor here because that partly committed seat is the most sensitive to blocker pressure.
